// about me

The Engineer Behind the Terminal

I'm a DevOps engineer with a deep passion for automating infrastructure and streamlining deployment workflows. My toolkit spans across cloud platforms, container orchestration, and CI/CD pipelines.

From provisioning infrastructure with Terraform to orchestrating microservices on Kubernetes, I build systems that are resilient, scalable, and fully automated.

When I'm not writing YAML or debugging pipelines, you'll find me exploring new DevOps tools, contributing to open source, or writing about what I've learned.

20+
Projects
2+
Years
10+

// my work

Projects That Ship

Kubernetes

K8s Auto-Scaler

Automated horizontal pod autoscaling based on custom Prometheus metrics. Includes alerting rules, Grafana dashboards, and HPA configurations for production workloads.

KubernetesPrometheusGrafanaHelm
GitHub Live
IaC

AWS Infra with Terraform

Complete AWS infrastructure provisioned using Terraform modules — VPC, ECS Fargate, RDS, ALB, and S3 with remote state management and automated drift detection.

AWSTerraformS3CloudWatch
GitHub Live
CI/CD

CI/CD Pipeline Builder

Multi-stage Jenkins pipeline with Docker-based build agents, automated testing, artifact publishing, and blue-green deployments to ECS with rollback support.

JenkinsDockerAWS ECSBash
GitHub Live
GitOps

GitOps Deployment Flow

End-to-end GitOps workflow using ArgoCD and GitLab CI. Application manifests are versioned in Git, with automated sync, health checks, and progressive rollouts.

ArgoCDGitLab CIKubernetesKustomize
GitHub Live

// today i learned

From the Terminal Log

2024-12-15

Understanding Kubernetes Ingress Controllers

A deep dive into Kubernetes Ingress controllers, comparing Nginx, Traefik, and HAProxy. Learn how to route external traffic to your cluster services efficiently.

KubernetesNetworkingDevOps
Read more → 2024-11-28

Terraform Fundamentals: Infrastructure as Code

Getting started with Terraform — from basic HCL syntax to managing remote state and building reusable modules for cloud infrastructure provisioning.

TerraformIaCAWS
Read more →
